nasb.text: So Balaam arose in the morning and said to Balak’s leaders, “Go back to your land, for the Lord has refused to let me go with you.”

esv.text: So Balaam rose in the morning and said to the princes of Balak, “Go to your own land, for the Lord has refused to let me go with you.”

cnv.text: 巴蘭早晨起來，對巴勒的領袖說：“你們回本地去吧，因為耶和華不准我與你們同去。”

ccb.text: 第二天清早，巴兰对巴勒的使臣说：“你们回去吧，耶和华不准我跟你们去。”
